name: hk-planner
description: HK Planner — housekeeping & maintenance scheduler. Single-file vanilla-JS frontend deployed to Netlify, backed by Supabase edge functions.

scripts.deploy:netlify: cd deploy-netlify && zip -qr /tmp/hk-deploy.zip . -x '*.DS_Store' && curl -s -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $(grep -E '^export NETLIFY_AUTH_TOKEN' ~/.netlify/token.env | cut -d'"' -f2)" -H 'Content-Type: application/zip' --data-binary @/tmp/hk-deploy.zip https://api.netlify.com/api/v1/sites/d6377da2-9acb-4fbf-84a5-f7bdd87e120b/deploys
